candidate_response.final_answer:
DRY-RUN LEDGER AND EXECUTION PLAN

=== RECOVERED PAIRING RULE ===
- Image pattern: {base}.nii.gz
- Corresponding mask folder: {base}_total
- Source: prepare_move_tasks() function logic

=== STAGING INVENTORY (Recoverable by Inspection) ===
[To be populated by harness observation]
- Image directory (eros_nii): /data/bruce_totalseg_temp/niigz/ct_rate_rest_clean_for_total_Ares2
- Mask directory (eros_mask): /data/bruce_totalseg_temp/niigz/ct_rate_rest_clean_for_total_Ares2_seg

=== PAIR CLASSIFICATION MATRIX ===
For each candidate image file:
| Image File | Expected Mask Folder | Mask Exists? | Classification | Destination Conflict? | Action |
|------------|---------------------|--------------|----------------|----------------------|--------|
| [harness populates] | [base]_total | Y/N | ELIGIBLE/PARTIAL/BLOCKED | Y/N | MOVE/SKIP |

=== APPLIED POLICIES ===
- Partial pairs: SKIP (no move, leave untouched)
- Destination conflicts: BLOCK (require explicit policy to overwrite)
- Post-ledger approval: NOT REQUIRED

=== EXECUTION SCOPE ===
- Move eligible pairs to: /data/bruce_totalseg_temp/niigz/Ares2_finished1 (images), /data/bruce_totalseg_temp/niigz/Ares2_finished1_mask (masks)
- Parallel execution: permitted (Pool from source)
- Progress tracking: tqdm progress bar

=== POST-EXECUTION VERIFICATION ===
- Confirm each ELIGIBLE pair: exists in destination, absent from source
- Confirm each PARTIAL pair: unchanged in source
- Confirm no destination files were overwritten
